name: Employee Onboarding Orchestrator
description: Automates the full employee onboarding process from offer acceptance to day-90 review.

steps: 1. Receive new hire confirmation with start date and personal details
2. Create accounts: email, Slack, HRIS, access management system
3. Send personalized welcome email with first-day instructions and schedule
4. Provision laptop and hardware via IT ticketing system
5. Assign mandatory compliance and role-specific training courses
6. Schedule orientation, team intro meetings, and manager 1:1
7. Send benefits enrollment link and deadline reminder

name: Invoice Processing Router
description: Ingests invoices, extracts data via OCR, validates against POs, and routes for approval.

steps: 1. Monitor invoice inbox for new submissions
2. Extract invoice data via PDF OCR
3. Match invoice to purchase order in ERP
4. Apply approval routing: auto <$500, manager >$500, CFO >$5000
5. Send approval request to designated approver
7. Update AP ledger and send vendor confirmation
